Hamiltonian dynamics propogates withina level set
Let ￼ be the Markov kernel that resample the momentum according to the Gaussian distribution with covariance matrix ￼
Momentum refresh propogates between level sets
The combination ￼ defines an irriducible and ergodic Markov kernel!
